name: trainee-portal
description: Trainee Portal monorepo: Vite+React+TypeScript frontend and Express+TypeScript backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
